films.title: The Drama
films.cast: Zendaya, Robert Pattinson, Alana Haim, Mamoudou Athie
films.description: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails...  "The cringe-inducing observations about human behaviour when confronted with uncomfortable truths make for a skin-crawlingly fun time" Hannah Strong, Little White Lies.

films.title: California Schemin'
films.description: Based on the improbably true story, CALIFORNIA SCHEMIN’ follows two aspiring Scottish MCs who devise an audacious scheme to achieve their dream of a record deal, by posing as Californian hip hop artists. As fame beckons and the lies pile up, their friendship is put to the test.
